overall.description: A first-person perspective journey aboard a futuristic metro train in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City at night. The clip captures the interior of the train car with cybernetically augmented passengers, transitions through urban canyons with towering brutalist architecture, and concludes with arrival at a station.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train car with digital displays

events.description: train passes a 'Wellspring' station sign visible through the window
exterior lighting shifts as train passes through different urban lighting zones

agents.ego_description: standing inside the moving train, observing other passengers and the passing cityscape

notable_agents.action: man wearing a mask and jacket sitting on the bench looking down at the floor
woman with backpack standing and holding the overhead rail

entered.detail: holographic display showing the train route map and station names
futuristic train seating with geometric pattern upholstery
orange handrail pole for standing passengers
large train window showing the passing Night Cityscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic metro train car with green padded benches and holographic route displays. A masked man sits in the center while a woman stands on the left holding the rail. The train moves through the city at night, passing by a 'Wellspring' station sign visible through the window as the interior lighting mixes with the neon glow from outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior left side transitioning to exterior building views

events.description: camera pans left to reveal additional passengers on the left side of the car
view shifts from interior focus to exterior urban architecture through the window

agents.ego_description: panning left to observe other passengers and then looking out at the passing brutalist architecture

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos sitting and looking down
woman with glasses and white top using her phone

entered.detail: sliding glass door with NCART logo and metal frame
tall concrete and glass buildings passing by the window

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a shirtless tattooed man and a woman using her phone, then shifts focus to the exterior view through the window. The train passes by towering concrete buildings as the interior elements move out of frame, transitioning from the intimate train interior to the imposing urban landscape outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with overhead walkways and infrastructure

events.description: train enters a covered urban canyon with massive overhead structural beams
passing under a large red painted metal girder structure

agents.ego_description: looking up at the towering architecture and industrial infrastructure above the train

entered.detail: large painted steel beams forming the overhead support structure
tall building with grid pattern of illuminated windows
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the tracks

segments.scene_description: The view shifts upward to show the train passing through a dense urban canyon, dominated by massive red steel girders and concrete overpasses. The camera captures the brutalist architecture of Night City with illuminated windows and industrial piping visible against the night sky, with no passengers visible in this exterior-focused sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station platform and arrival area

events.description: train approaches and enters a station with visible platform and billboards
train slows down and comes to a stop at the station platform

agents.ego_description: preparing to exit as the train arrives at the station and comes to a halt

notable_agents.action: man standing near the door holding the rail, ready to exit the train

entered.detail: concrete platform with safety markings and station signage
large digital advertisement displaying 'COLA' and other products
holographic display showing the train route map
futuristic train seating with geometric pattern upholstery

segments.scene_description: The train approaches a station with bright illuminated billboards visible on the platform. As the train slows to a stop, the view returns to the interior showing the digital route display and green benches. A man stands ready by the door to exit, and the segment ends with the train stationary at the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within the intimate interior of a futuristic metro train and expands into the imposing brutalist architecture of the city before returning to the cabin upon arrival. It begins inside the car among green padded benches and holographic displays, passing a masked man and a woman as the neon glow of a Wellspring station sign flickers past the window. As the camera pans left past tattooed passengers, the focus shifts entirely toward the exterior, transitioning from the cabin's interior to a view of towering concrete buildings. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a dense urban canyon dominated by massive red steel girders and industrial piping against the night sky. Finally, the view returns to the interior as the train slows toward a station filled with bright billboards, coming to a complete stop with a passenger standing ready by the door.
